name: khyndall
ai_summary: khyndall Cole has childcare experience through her mom's in-home daycare and part-time availability in Phoenix, AZ (15mi drive). She separates children first, asks them separately what happened, and works toward resolution, leveraging her experience with kids from newborns to older children.

transcripts.q3: Hi, my name is Kendall Cole, I have experience in childcare. My mom owns an in-home daycare and I partakes in child development, while in high school, and I would really love this opportunity to work with kids and have a flexible schedule.
transcripts.q4: I'm located in Phoenix Arizona. I'm willing to travel up to 15 minutes for shift, maybe 20.
transcripts.q5: Hi, I'm looking for part-time work. I would be available. Monday, Tuesday and Thursday and Friday.
transcripts.q6: First things first, I would separate the kids. Ask them separately, what happened as two witnesses what happened? You know, have them have a conversation as to why they felt like they needed to put their hands on the other child and, you know, just try to come to a resolution between the kids.
transcripts.q7: I would make a great teacher because I've all my experience with kids and I've been around them for a while like newborns all the way up to like you know older kids.
